HomePage.title: Hello, World!
HomePage.description: This is an internationalized Next.js application using next-intl.

ExamplesPage.title: Component Examples
ExamplesPage.description: This page demonstrates server and client components with next-intl.
ExamplesPage.serverComponentDescription: This section is rendered on the server. The current locale is: {locale}. Server components can use useTranslations directly without any client-side JavaScript.
ExamplesPage.clientComponentDescription: This section is a client component. It has interactive state and can use hooks like useTranslations on the client side.
